servicesPage.intro: Sanchez Auto Service offers a full range of auto repair and maintenance services in Dallas, TX. From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake services to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Our brake services include pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, caliper repair, and brake fluid flushes. We inspect your entire braking system to guarantee optimal performance.
benefits: Peace of mind on the road

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We thoroughly inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace worn components with high-quality parts.

process.title: Testing
process.description: Test drive and final check to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and reliable engine repairs.
services.longDescription: Using advanced diagnostic tools, we pinpoint engine issues—from check engine lights to performance problems. Our repairs restore your engine's efficiency and power.

process.title: Scan
process.description: Connect diagnostic scanner to read error codes.

process.title: Analyze
process.description: Interpret data and perform additional tests if needed.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Fix the root cause with precision and care.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be a loose gas cap or a serious engine issue. We can diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular maintenance.
services.longDescription: We offer conventional and synthetic oil changes, plus fluid checks and replacements for coolant, transmission, brake, and power steering fluids.

process.title: Drain
process.description: Drain old oil and replace oil filter.

process.title: Fill
process.description: Add the correct type and amount of new oil.

process.title: Check
process.description: Inspect other fluid levels and top off as needed.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Every 3,000 to 5,000 miles for conventional oil, up to 10,000 for synthetic.

faqs.question: What type of oil does my car need?
faqs.answer: We'll recommend the best oil based on your vehicle's make and model.

services.title: Tire Services & Alignment
services.shortDescription: Maximize tire life and improve handling.
services.longDescription: Our tire services include mounting, balancing, rotation, and alignment. We help you choose the right tires and ensure even wear for a smooth ride.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: Check tire condition, tread depth, and pressure.

process.title: Service
process.description: Mount, balance, rotate, or align as needed.

process.title: Verify
process.description: Test drive to confirm proper alignment and balance.

faqs.question: When should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,000 miles to ensure even tread wear.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Signs include uneven tire wear, vehicle pulling to one side, or a crooked steering wheel.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Repair Shop in Dallas, TX
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe and mobile.
story: Sanchez Auto Service has been serving the Dallas community for over 30 years. Founded by master mechanic Juan Sanchez, our shop started as a small garage with a big commitment to quality. Over the decades, we've grown by earning the trust of thousands of customers through reliable repairs and transparent service.

Today, we continue that tradition with a team of certified technicians who share a passion for cars and customer care. Whether it's a simple oil change or a complex engine overhaul, we treat every vehicle as if it were our own. We believe in educating our customers so they can make informed decisions about their vehicles.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always recommend only necessary repairs and provide upfront pricing.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow industry best practices.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority; we listen and communicate clearly.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to be a local business supporting Dallas drivers.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Sanchez Auto Service
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
